combos.contextRelayDesc: Preserves session continuity with handoff summaries when accounts rotate
combos.randomDesc: Ensartet tilfældig udvælgelse, derefter tilbagevenden til de resterende modeller
combos.leastUsedDesc: Vælger modellen med færrest anmodninger, balancerer belastningen over tid
combos.costOptimizedDesc: Ruter til den billigste model først baseret på priser

combos.strictRandomDesc: Shuffle deck — uses each model once before reshuffling
combos.contextRelayHandoffThresholdHelp: When quota usage reaches this threshold, OmniRoute generates a structured handoff summary before the active account is exhausted.
combos.contextRelayMaxMessagesHelp: Limits how much recent history is condensed into the relay summary.
combos.contextRelaySummaryModelHelp: Optional override model used only for generating the handoff summary. Leave empty to reuse the active combo model.
combos.contextRelayProviderNote: Context Relay currently generates handoffs for Codex account rotation. Pair it with multiple accounts of the same provider for the best continuity.
combos.advancedHint: Lad være tom for at bruge globale standardindstillinger. Disse tilsidesætter indstillinger for hver udbyder.

priority.when: Du har én foretrukken model og ønsker kun at falde tilbage på fejl.
priority.avoid: Du skal anmode om fordeling på tværs af modeller.
priority.example: Primær kodningsmodel med billigere backup for nedbrud.

weighted.when: Du har brug for kontrolleret trafik fordelt på modeller.
weighted.avoid: Du kan ikke opretholde nøjagtige vægte over tid.

round-robin.when: Du ønsker forudsigelig og jævn fordeling.
round-robin.avoid: Modeller afviger for meget i latens eller omkostninger.
round-robin.example: Samme model på flere konti for at sprede gennemløb.

random.when: Du ønsker enkel distribution med minimal opsætning.
random.avoid: Du har brug for strenge trafikgarantier.

least-used.when: Du vil have adaptiv balancering baseret på live-efterspørgsel.
least-used.avoid: Trafikken er for lav til at drage fordel af brugsbalancering.
least-used.example: Blandede arbejdsbelastninger, hvor en model ofte bliver overbelastet.

cost-optimized.example: Baggrunds- eller batchjob, hvor lavere omkostninger foretrækkes.

reset-aware.when: __MISSING__:You route across multiple accounts with quota telemetry and different reset windows.
reset-aware.avoid: __MISSING__:Quota telemetry is unavailable for most accounts.
reset-aware.example: __MISSING__:Prefer a 60% weekly account resetting tomorrow over an 80% account resetting later.

strict-random.when: Use when you want perfectly even spread — each model used once before repeating.
strict-random.avoid: Avoid when models have different quality or latency and order matters.
strict-random.example: Example: Multiple accounts of the same model to distribute usage evenly.

p2c.when: Use when you want low-latency selection using Power-of-Two-Choices algorithm.
p2c.avoid: Avoid for small combos with 2 or fewer models — no benefit over round-robin.
p2c.example: Example: High-throughput inference across 4+ equivalent model endpoints.

context-relay.when: Use when long sessions must survive account rotation without losing the working context.
context-relay.avoid: Avoid when account switching is rare or when you do not want extra summarization requests.
context-relay.example: Example: Codex sessions that rotate across multiple accounts near quota exhaustion.

fill-first.when: __MISSING__:Use when you want to fully exhaust one provider's quota before moving to the next.
fill-first.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when you need request-level load balancing across providers.
fill-first.example: __MISSING__:Example: Use all $200 Deepgram credits before falling back to Groq.

auto.when: __MISSING__:Use when you need multi-factor scoring routing based on cost, latency, and quality.
auto.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when you need strict priority ordering or historical persistence.
auto.example: __MISSING__:Example: Balance requests across models with different strengths.

lkgp.when: __MISSING__:Use when you want to route based on historical success rates and performance.
lkgp.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when historical data is limited or unreliable.
lkgp.example: __MISSING__:Example: Route to models with a good track record on specific tasks.

context-optimized.when: __MISSING__:Use when you need to optimize context window usage across models.
context-optimized.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when models have similar context lengths or tasks are simple.
context-optimized.example: __MISSING__:Example: Distribute long conversations across models with larger context windows.

priority.title: Fail-safe baseline
priority.description: Use one primary model and keep fallback chain short and reliable.
priority.tip1: Put your most reliable model first.
priority.tip2: Keep 1-2 backup models with similar quality.
priority.tip3: Use safe retries to absorb transient provider failures.

weighted.title: Controlled traffic split
weighted.description: Great for canary rollouts and gradual migration between models.
weighted.tip2: Keep the total at 100% and auto-balance after changes.
weighted.tip3: Monitor success and latency before increasing canary weight.

round-robin.title: Predictable load sharing
round-robin.description: Best when models are equivalent and you need smooth distribution.
round-robin.tip2: Set concurrency limits to avoid burst overload.
round-robin.tip3: Use queue timeout to fail fast under saturation.

random.title: Quick spread with low setup
random.description: Use when you need simple distribution without strict guarantees.
random.tip1: Use models with similar latency profiles.
random.tip2: Keep retries enabled to absorb random misses.
random.tip3: Prefer this for experimentation, not strict SLAs.

least-used.title: Adaptive balancing
least-used.description: Routes to less-used models to reduce hotspots over time.
least-used.tip2: Combine with health checks for safer balancing.
least-used.tip3: Track per-model usage to validate distribution gains.

cost-optimized.title: Budget-first routing
cost-optimized.description: Routes to lower-cost models when pricing metadata is available.
cost-optimized.tip1: Ensure pricing coverage for all selected models.
cost-optimized.tip2: Keep a quality fallback for hard prompts.
cost-optimized.tip3: Use for batch/background jobs where cost is the main KPI.

reset-aware.title: __MISSING__:Reset-aware account rotation
reset-aware.description: __MISSING__:Balances remaining provider quota against reset timing.
reset-aware.tip1: __MISSING__:Use explicit account steps or account-tag routing for providers with quota telemetry.
reset-aware.tip2: __MISSING__:Tune session vs weekly weights when short-term exhaustion is more risky.
reset-aware.tip3: __MISSING__:Keep the tie band small so equivalent accounts still rotate fairly.

strict-random.title: Shuffle deck distribution
strict-random.description: Each model is used exactly once per cycle before reshuffling.
strict-random.tip1: Use at least 2 models for meaningful distribution.
strict-random.tip3: Ideal for load balancing across multiple API accounts.

fill-first.description: __MISSING__:Exhaust provider quotas sequentially before falling back.
fill-first.tip1: __MISSING__:Use for quota-based routing with clear fallback chains.
fill-first.tip2: __MISSING__:Set quotas accurately to avoid premature fallback.
fill-first.tip3: __MISSING__:Works best with providers offering free tiers or credit buckets.
fill-first.title: __MISSING__:Quota Exhaustion

auto.description: __MISSING__:Route based on real-time scoring for cost, latency, quality, and health.
auto.tip1: __MISSING__:Let the engine balance multiple factors automatically.
auto.tip2: __MISSING__:Monitor which factors drive routing decisions in logs.
auto.tip3: __MISSING__:Use for complex workloads where no single factor dominates.
auto.title: __MISSING__:Multi-Factor Optimization

lkgp.description: __MISSING__:Route based on historical performance and success patterns.
lkgp.tip1: __MISSING__:Requires sufficient request history for accurate predictions.
lkgp.tip2: __MISSING__:Good for workloads with consistent model performance patterns.
lkgp.tip3: __MISSING__:Monitor prediction accuracy and adjust weights as needed.
lkgp.title: __MISSING__:History-Based Routing

context-optimized.description: __MISSING__:Optimize routing based on context window usage and token efficiency.
context-optimized.tip1: __MISSING__:Route long conversations to models with larger context windows.
context-optimized.tip2: __MISSING__:Monitor context utilization to avoid token waste.
context-optimized.tip3: __MISSING__:Best for conversational AI requiring extensive context retention.
context-optimized.title: __MISSING__:Context Optimization

context-relay.description: __MISSING__:Best when account rotation is expected and the next account must inherit a simplified task summary.
context-relay.tip1: __MISSING__:Use with providers rotating accounts for the same model family.
context-relay.tip2: __MISSING__:Set handoff threshold below hard quota cutoffs for summary generation time.
context-relay.tip3: __MISSING__:Only set a dedicated summary model if the primary is too expensive or unstable.
context-relay.title: __MISSING__:Session Continuity Priority

p2c.description: __MISSING__:Route to the provider with the lowest current load based on real-time metrics.
p2c.tip1: __MISSING__:Monitor provider health metrics for accurate load assessment.
p2c.tip3: __MISSING__:Adjust sensitivity to avoid oscillation during traffic spikes.
p2c.title: __MISSING__:Power of Two Choices

combos.templateFreeStackDesc: Round-robin across all free providers: Kiro (Claude), Qoder (5 models), Qwen (4 models), Gemini CLI. Zero cost, never stops coding.

Merged after OmniRoute adds auth from the provider API key. translator.title: Oversætter
translator.metaDescription: Debug, test og visualiser API-formatoversættelser mellem udbydere
translator.modeDescriptionPlayground: Indsæt enhver API-anmodningstekst og se, hvordan OmniRoute oversætter den mellem udbyderformater (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API)
translator.modeDescriptionChatTester: Send rigtige chatanmodninger gennem OmniRoute og inspicer hele rundrejsen: input, oversat anmodning, udbydersvar og oversat output.
translator.modeDescriptionTestBench: Kør foruddefinerede scenarier og sammenlign kompatibilitet på tværs af udbydere og modeller.

translator.modeDescriptionFallback: Debug, test og visualiser, hvordan OmniRoute oversætter API-anmodninger mellem udbydere.
translator.eventsAppearHint: Oversættelsesbegivenheder vises her, når anmodninger flyder gennem OmniRoute. Brug en af disse metoder til at generere begivenheder:
translator.inMemoryNote: Bemærk: Hændelser gemmes i hukommelsen og nulstilles, når serveren genstarter.
translator.formatConverterDescription: Indsæt eller skriv en JSON-anmodningstekst. Oversætteren vil automatisk registrere kildeformatet og konvertere det til målformatet. Brug dette til at fejlsøge, hvordan OmniRoute oversætter anmodninger mellem formater (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API).

translator.featureSchemaCoercionDesc: __MISSING__:Fixes broken tool schemas: adds missing additionalProperties, sanitizes long descriptions, normalizes nested objects.
translator.featureRoleNormalizationDesc: __MISSING__:Maps developer→system for non-OpenAI targets. Maps system→user for models that don't support system role.
translator.featureToolCallIdsDesc: __MISSING__:Generates unique tool_call IDs when missing. Normalizes to 9-char format for providers like Mistral.
translator.featureMissingToolResponseDesc: __MISSING__:Injects empty tool_result messages when clients send tool_calls without corresponding responses.
translator.featureThinkingBudgetDesc: __MISSING__:Automatically manages thinking config. Removes thinking parameters when the last message is not from the user.
translator.featureDirectPathsDesc: __MISSING__:Some format pairs (Claude→Gemini) have direct translators that bypass the OpenAI hub, producing more accurate output.
translator.featureImageMappingDesc: __MISSING__:Translates image dimension conventions between API formats (e.g., OpenAI detail levels → Gemini dimensions).
translator.inputPlaceholder: Indsæt en anmodningstekst her eller vælg en skabelon nedenfor...
translator.templateLoadHint: Skabelonen indlæser anmodningen i formatet {format}. Skift kildeformat for at indlæse i et andet format.
translator.testBenchDescription: Kør foruddefinerede scenarier (simpel chat, værktøjsopkald osv.) for at bekræfte oversættelse og udbyderkompatibilitet. Vælg et kildeformat og måludbyder, og kør derefter alle test for at se en kompatibilitetsprocent. Brug dette til at finde ud af, hvilke funktioner der fungerer på tværs af udbydere.

landing.heroDescription: AI-slutpunktsproxy med web-dashboard - En JavaScript-port af CLIProxyAPI. Fungerer problemfrit med Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cline, RooCode og andre CLI-værktøjer.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Alt hvad du behøver for at administrere din AI-infrastruktur på ét sted, bygget til skala.
landing.featureUnifiedEndpointDesc: Få adgang til alle udbydere via en enkelt standard API-URL.
landing.featureEasySetupDesc: Kom i gang på få minutter med npx-kommandoen.
landing.featureModelFallbackDesc: Skift automatisk udbyder ved fejl eller høj latenstid.

landing.howItWorksDescription: Data flyder problemfrit fra din applikation gennem vores intelligente routing-lag til den bedste udbyder til jobbet.
landing.howItWorksStep1Description: Dine anmodninger starter fra dine yndlingsværktøjer eller vores forenede SDK. Skift blot den grundlæggende URL.
landing.howItWorksStep2Description: Vores motor analyserer prompten, tjekker udbyderens helbred og ruter for laveste latenstid eller omkostninger.
landing.howItWorksStep3Description: Anmodningen opfyldes af OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini eller andre øjeblikkeligt.

legal.privacyMetadataDescription: Privatlivspolitik for OmniRoute AI API proxy-routeren.
legal.termsMetadataDescription: Servicevilkår for OmniRoute AI API proxy-routeren.
legal.privacySection1Text: OmniRoute er designet som en lokal-først-applikation. Al databehandling og lagring foregår udelukkende på din maskine. Der er ingen centraliseret server, der indsamler dine oplysninger.
legal.privacyDataApiKeysDesc: krypteret og gemt lokalt til godkendelse hos AI-udbydere
legal.privacyDataUsageLogsDesc: antal anmodninger, tokenbrug, modelnavne, tidsstempler og svartider
legal.privacySection3Text: OmniRoute indsamler ikke telemetri, analyser eller nedbrudsrapporter. Der sendes ingen data til os eller nogen tredjepart. Dine brugsmønstre, API-kald og konfigurationer forbliver helt private.
legal.privacySection4Text: Når du foretager API-kald gennem OmniRoute, videresendes dine anmodninger til de AI-udbydere, du har konfigureret (for eksempel: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). Disse udbydere har deres egne privatlivspolitikker, der styrer, hvordan de håndterer dine data. Gennemgå venligst:
legal.privacySection5Text: Hvis du aktiverer den valgfri cloud-synkroniseringsfunktion, kan udbyderkonfigurationer og API-nøgler overføres til et konfigureret cloud-slutpunkt. Denne funktion er deaktiveret som standard og kræver eksplicit opt-in.
legal.privacyLoggingIntro: Anmodningslogfiler kan konfigureres via dashboardindstillingerne. Du kan:
legal.privacySection7TextStart: Da alle data er gemt lokalt, har du fuld kontrol. Du kan til enhver tid slette dine data ved at fjerne
legal.privacySection7TextEnd: bibliotek eller ved hjælp af databasesikkerhedskopierings- og gendannelsesfunktionerne i dashboardet.
legal.termsSection1Text: OmniRoute er en lokal-første AI API proxy-router, der fungerer udelukkende på din maskine. Det dirigerer anmodninger til flere AI-udbydere med belastningsbalancering, failover og brugssporing.
legal.termsResponsibilityApiKeys: Du er alene ansvarlig for at administrere dine egne API-nøgler og legitimationsoplysninger for tredjeparts AI-udbydere (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google osv.).
legal.termsResponsibilityCompliance: Du skal overholde servicevilkårene for hver AI-udbyder, hvis API du tilgår via OmniRoute.
legal.termsResponsibilitySecurity: Du er ansvarlig for sikkerheden af ​​din lokale OmniRoute-installation, herunder indstilling af en adgangskode og begrænsning af netværksadgang.

cache.title: Cache Management
cache.description: Monitor and manage semantic response cache, hit rates, and token savings.
cache.behaviorDeterministic: Only non-streaming requests with temperature=0 are cached.
cache.behaviorTwoTier: Two-tier storage: in-memory LRU (fast) + SQLite (persistent across restarts).
cache.unavailableDesc: Could not fetch cache statistics. Make sure the server is running.
cache.promptCacheSectionDesc: Shows provider-side prompt caching activity from usage history so you can see where cache control is active and how much input reuse you are getting.
cache.promptTrendDesc: Hourly request volume, cache coverage, and cache read volume across the last 24 hours.
cache.providerCacheRateDesc: Each provider exposes total input tokens, cache read tokens, and cache write tokens so you can verify the reuse ratio against raw totals.
cache.semanticCacheSectionDesc: OmniRoute's own deterministic response cache. When enabled, repeated non-streaming temperature=0 requests can be served locally without hitting the upstream provider.
cache.semanticCacheDisabledDesc: Semantic cache is disabled. OmniRoute will skip local response reuse until you turn it back on in Settings.
cache.semanticEntriesDesc: Persisted semantic cache records currently stored in SQLite. Provider-side prompt cache activity is not listed here.
cache.entriesLoadError: Failed to load semantic cache entries.
cache.noPromptCacheData: No provider-side prompt cache activity has been recorded yet.
cache.noTrendData: No prompt cache activity has been recorded over the last 24 hours.
